titleStmt.title: SII 10.27: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 27. (A.R. No. 596 of 1909.) ON THE NĀGA PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF VĪRABHADRA OUTSIDE THE VILLAGE OF GURAZALA, PALNAD TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. [10]51.

summary.p: States that a Brāhman named Dāra son of Kommana who was the head of Kummunūru village and who claimed to be an incarnation of the serpent king Śēsha, put up a nāga-stambha in front of the temple of Brahmā, Vishṇu, and Śiva built by himself and that Bētabhūpa of the Haihaya family, a dependent of Bhūlōkamalladēva (Sōmēśvara III) made a gift of 4 kharis of land to the said temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśēṣavāsukitakṣakaka¨rkkōṭakama
hābhujāḥ . śaṁkapālōtha kuśikō hya
ṣṭā nāgāḥ purābhavan . Āgacchaṁtu mahābhā
gā nāgā śēṣādayōtratu . sānnidhyaṁ kuru
ta kṣipraṁ śubhāśubhaparīkṣaṇē . śēṣāṁśō bhū
talēsminnajani kaliyugē kommanākhyaprasiddhaḥ . rū
ḍhaḥ kāṇḍinyagōtrē nijakulatilakaḥ kummunū
rggrāmamukhyaḥ . bugvēdaṁ tasya sūnuḥ kramapa
dasahitaṁ sānga mabhyasyamānō . jātaśrī
dāranāmā druhiṇaharivṛṣānkālaya
sthāpanā¨rtthaṁ . diśāpālasamāḥ putrāstasya jā
tā vasūpamāḥ . Aṣṭā vaṁśābhivṛdhya¨rtthaṁ brāhmaṇāḥ
pitṛvatsalāḥ . . śākābdē caṁdrabāṇāṁbaraśaśigaṇi
tē saumyasaṁvatsarē jyē . śuddhapakṣatṛtīyē tridaśa
gurudinē vṛścikasthē surējyē . tēna śrīdāranāmnā
dvijavarapatinā mādhavīpaṭṭaṇē śrī nāgastaṁ
bhapratiṣṭhā śṛtividhivihitā sannidhau tatra yasya .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāśrayakulatilaka cālukyābharaṇa
śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdratāraṁ
bu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdaṁbula rājyaṁbu sēyu
cuṁḍaṁgā tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁca
mahāśabda mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Anēkōttuṁgata
raṁgasaṁghāta lavaṇōdadhivēlāvalayavala
yitagaṁgāpā¨ryyāta madhyadēśādhīśvara mā
hiṣmatīpuravarēśvara Ahihayavaṁśōdbhava [Ā]trē
yagōtra [Atyugranaraśirō]da¨rppaṇadhvaja
ghōṣaṇa sahasrabāhu pratāpavī¨ryyagu
ṇasaṁpannu laina śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara . Aja
nihima vaṁśō rājarājakṣitīśō jaya
yuvatisanāthō madhyadēśādhināthaḥ . sakala
bhuvanarakṣārājavidyātidakṣō bhuvanavi
ditakī¨rttiḥ puṣpakōdaṇḍamū¨rttiḥ . . tasyā
grasūnu ¨rbbirudaṁkarudraḥ śrībēta
bhūpakṣitipāgragaṇyaḥ śau¨ryyā¨rjjitānē
kadhanapradāna saṁtōṣitā¨rtthi dvijadīnalōkaḥ .
sōyaṁ pū¨rvvadharādhināthacaritō vīrāgra
gaṇyō raṇē brahmaśrīpatipā¨rvvatīpatiha
vi¨rbbalya¨rccanāsiddhayē . prādā diddhayaśōdhanaḥ
kṛtacatuḥkhāripramāṇaṁ bhavaṁ cātu
rvva¨rṇnacaritrajanmanilaḥ śrīmādhavī
paṭṭaṇē . bahubhi ¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhi
ssagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhū
mi stasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . madvaṁśajāḥ para
mahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasō
bhuvi bhāvibhūpāḥ . yē pālayaṁti ma
ma dha¨rmma mimaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā
viracitōṁjali rēṣa mū¨rddhni . sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmmasētu nnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī
yō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvānētā nbhāvinaḥ pā¨rtthi
vēṁdrā nbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
macaṁdraḥ .
narakē vasēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
